mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is elevated, the discount rate on equities stays restrictive and the S&P 500 should underperform over the next month. The signal is strongest when CPIAUCSL is not falling, because real-rate pressure is then more persistent and the market cannot price an imminent easing cycle.
failure_condition: Rejected if triggered observations produce positive 20d SPX returns in more than 55% of cases, or if the average 20d return after FEDFUNDS > 4.5% is not below the unconditional mean by at least 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE from its recent level signals weakening household income and slower risk appetite, which should depress S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The effect should be most visible when PAYEMS is also slowing, because labor deterioration then reflects broad demand softness rather than a temporary labor-force adjustment.
failure_condition: Rejected if 20d forward SPX returns are positive in a majority of UNRATE-rise triggers, or if the signal loses predictive power after controlling for PAYEMS growth direction.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in RSAFS indicates stronger retail demand and near-term earnings support for consumer-facing firms, which should lift the S&P 500 over the next month. The signal should fail when higher sales are not accompanied by stable or falling inflation, because then nominal sales gains are likely price-driven rather than volume-driven.
failure_condition: Rejected if positive changes in RSAFS do not correspond to above-median 20d SPX returns, or if the effect disappears when CPIAUCSL is rising faster than RSAFS.

mechanism_narrative: Improving INDPRO reflects stronger industrial output and operating leverage across cyclicals, which should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over a quarter. The effect is most reliable when HOUST is also firm, because concurrent strength in manufacturing and housing indicates a broad supply-side recovery rather than a sector-specific rebound.
failure_condition: Rejected if 60d forward SPX returns are not higher after INDPRO improvements, or if the joint INDPRO-HOUST signal is indistinguishable from noise in rolling out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals a housing demand contraction that precedes weaker cyclical earnings and lower equity returns. The effect should emerge within one month and intensify when GDPC1 is also soft, because housing weakness then reflects economy-wide demand deceleration rather than temporary supply constraints.
failure_condition: Rejected if HOUST drops of the specified size are followed by positive 20d SPX returns more than half the time, or if the signal vanishes when GDP growth is below trend.

mechanism_narrative: A falling CPIAUCSL inflation rate signals easing price pressure and a lower expected path for policy rates, which should support S&P 500 returns over the next five trading days through discount-rate repricing. The effect fails when FEDFUNDS is already rising, because restrictive policy can dominate the inflation signal.
failure_condition: Rejected if 5d SPX returns are not above average during disinflation episodes, or if the sign flips negative when FEDFUNDS is stable or declining.

mechanism_narrative: A stable or falling UNRATE combined with expanding PAYEMS indicates broad labor-market strength and resilient consumer spending, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The mechanism is not valid when unemployment is rising, because payroll gains then likely reflect lagged adjustments rather than current demand momentum.
failure_condition: Rejected if 60d forward returns are not positive when PAYEMS rises and UNRATE is flat or lower, or if the joint labor-strength signal fails to outperform a random benchmark.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-tightening regime, a flattening or declining FEDFUNDS rate should improve equity valuations because markets price a lower terminal policy path and easier refinancing conditions. This effect should be visible over 20 trading days and should fail if CPIAUCSL re-accelerates, because renewed inflation would restore upward pressure on policy expectations.
failure_condition: Rejected if consecutive FEDFUNDS declines do not correspond to above-median 20d SPX returns, or if the signal is erased when CPIAUCSL rises faster than the prior 3-month average.
